content:
# How to Automate Your Social Media with AI Tools in 2026

Tired of spending hours on social media? Let AI handle the heavy lifting!

For more tools, check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]]!

---

## Step 1: Generate Content Ideas & Copy

Use [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] or [[link:/tools/74|Copy.ai]] to generate post ideas, captions, and hashtags!

---

## Step 2: Create Visuals with AI

Use [[link:/tools/2|DALL-E 3]] or [[link:/tools/1|Midjourney]] for images, [[link:/tools/51|VEED.io]] or [[link:/tools/29|Pika Labs]] for videos!

---

## Step 3: Schedule Posts

Use tools like Buffer or Later to schedule (we don't track these, but they pair great with our AI tools!)

---

## Step 4: Analyze & Optimize

Review what performs best, then have AI generate more like it!

---

## Final Tip

Automate the repetitive stuff, keep the authentic engagement human!

Prefer a cheaper writing tool? Try our own AI writer → [[link:/writer|/writer]]

Discover more Productivity tools → [[link:/category/Productivity|/category/Productivity]]

---
